reviews.review_description: The owner of the game asked a friend and I to test the game. He was nice at first until my friend left. Then he became rude and would curse at me.  He repeatedly would kick me so we would end up back in the same server every time I rejoined. When I asked him why he was doing that, he would say that Michael Jackson is dead (my name is MonkeyJackson) so he would say that I had to die too. You also have to get kicked from the game to reclaim the cosmetics. In other words this game is poorly designed and the owner can cheat and help his friends cheat too (with X-ray vision to find people).

developer_response.body: one of my in game moderators was saying that he was me and did these thing to this kid me i never did anything i did meet the kid in game once and i never saw him again my ingame moderator was perm banned for impersonating and i never had anything to do with this
thanks i worked pretty hard on it
